sections.Featured: A selection of projects that best represent my current work and interests.
sections.Design: These are primarily projects that I have worked on across my career. Some of these projects are projects that the students I mentored worked on at the Co-Lab - those projects include links to the relevant Co-Lab project pages.
sections.Personal: This is a selection of my self-directed experiments and builds exploring fabrication, software, and design workflows.
sections.Woodworking: A focused collection of my woodworking projects, including pieces I have made while volunteering with the Bull City Woodshop.
